workflows.name: kaggle-collect-profile
workflows.description: Child workflow: one team member self-reports strengths, weaknesses, interests, and availability. Spawned per member by kaggle-competition-coordination.

workflows.name: kaggle-competition-coordination
workflows.description: Coordinate a team end-to-end through a Kaggle competition: gather profiles, match competitions, lead approval, repo + solution proposal, reviewer-iterate loop, submit, and admin next-steps.
